message:
refactor(bench): migrate wa_agent_streaming benchmark from tokio to asupersync runtime

The agent streaming benchmark was the last remaining benchmark using tokio
directly. This migrates it to the asupersync runtime via the runtime_compat
abstraction layer, consistent with the rest of the codebase.

Changes:
- Cargo.toml: Add "asupersync-runtime" to required-features for the
  wa_agent_streaming bench target alongside "distributed".
- wa_agent_streaming.rs: Replace tokio::net, tokio::io, and tokio::spawn
  with their asupersync equivalents (asupersync::net, asupersync::io,
  runtime_compat::task::spawn). Switch runtime construction from
  tokio::runtime::Builder to RuntimeBuilder::current_thread(). Replace
  BufReader-based line reading with read_to_end (simpler for single-frame
  loopback tests). Change from criterion's `b.to_async(&rt)` to manual
  `rt.block_on()` for compatibility with the compat runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
